description: A firm is bringing on co-counsel for a large case and needs to share the primary case files with them.

nodes.task_description: Identify the key case documents that need to be shared (e.g., all pleadings, major discovery responses).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of essential documents.

nodes.task_description: Compile the selected documents into a single, organized folder.
Share the folder with the co-counsel via a secure file sharing portal.

expected_outcome.expected: The files are securely transferred to the new legal team.
